title: Uruguayan Tuna Skewers
description: A flavorful and spicy Uruguayan-inspired dish featuring tuna skewers with a crispy crust.
instructions: Thread tuna steaks onto skewers, leaving a small space between each piece.
Brush skewers with olive oil and season with salt and pepper.
Grill skewers for 8-10 minutes per side, or until tuna reaches an internal temperature of 145°F.
While tuna is cooking, heat fiery Uruguayan sauce in a small saucepan over low heat.
Brush sauce onto tuna during the last 2 minutes of cooking.
Remove skewers from grill and top with crispy garlic and chopped cilantro.
Serve immediately with additional fiery Uruguayan sauce on the side, if desired.
